Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Class And Paga Claims Without Prejudice; Declaration Of Mariam Ghazaryan; [Proposed] Order Thereon
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Mariam Ghazaryan, Esq., MOON LAW GROUP, P.C. (213) 232-3128 mghazaryan@moonlawgroup.com
Attorney for Plaintiff Holly C. Tankard,
Alexander Polishuk, Esq., Polsinelli LLP, 310-229-1320 apolishuk@polsinelli.com for Defendant Honor Home Care Services California, Inc.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts as modified the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HOLLY TANKARD INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Class And Paga Claims Without Prejudice

The unopposed motion to dismiss class and PAGA claims without prejudice is granted. Plaintiff shows good cause and the court finds that dismissal is fair to absent aggrieved employees.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CVA)
